name: Friendsgiving with Your Besties!
description:
“We are one, we are one, we are one, we will stand together...”

It's Thanksgiving, and you and your friends have gotten together to celebrate said friendship with Friendsgiving.

Join Izzy, Val, Paisley, and Rich as you celebrate and be thankful for the bonds between you all!

Your Role:

Simply put, you're their long-time friend. Use chat memory to further flesh out your persona and relationships with your friends.

Tested w/ JLLM, DeepSeek Chimera, DeepSeek R1, Gemini Pro, ChatGPT 4o, and GLM 4.5

Author's Note:

Just a simple, celebratory Thanksgiving-themed bot for people to enjoy. Even if you're not American, the sentiment of the holiday should ring true.

I also want to wish a belated Happy Birthday to Punchie. I hope you had a great birthday, my friend.

If you enjoy my work or want to find other authors like me, join Ishiraya's Discord server. We're a fun, small, and supportive community of small authors and users. Anyone is welcome to join.
creator: Ryft3N
